title: Crispy Kenyan Chuck Roast Roast
description: A spicy, flaky one‑pan roast that uses sous‑vide to lock in tenderness and a quick sear for crisp edges. Whole30 friendly with a bright lime‑cilantro finish.

ingredients.name: Kenyan spice blend
ingredients.notes: blend of paprika, cayenne, cumin, coriander, cloves, salt, pepper

instructions: Season the chuck roast on all sides with the Kenyan spice blend and a pinch of sea salt.
Place the roast in a vacuum‑seal bag with the minced ginger and garlic, and vacuum seal.
Preheat a sous‑vide water bath to 140°F (60°C) and cook the roast for 2 hours.
Remove the roast from the bag, pat dry with paper towels, and let rest for 5 minutes.
Heat olive oil in a cast‑iron pan over high heat until shimmering.
Sear the roast on all sides until a deep brown crust forms, about 2 minutes per side.
Add beef broth to the pan, bring to a gentle simmer, and reduce the liquid by half to concentrate flavor.
Stir in fresh lime juice, then sprinkle with chopped cilantro before serving.
Slice the roast thinly against the grain and plate with a side of sautéed greens.
